text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I see the student council is busy as always. I hope you're faring well, Air— um, I mean Ms. Air Groove.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
…Why are you talking like that? 
Is something wrong?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Spe is always so polite around you, 
so I thought I should do the same…

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
So that's it… Well, not that I mind 
formal language in general…

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
But you and I are far too close for that, no? 
I see no point in keeping each other at 
arm's length.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Then I won't hold back in 
my speech… or our races.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: …Heh, that's what I like to hear.
